meta.privacy: 100% Private. No cloud databases. Your financial data stays inside your browser.

outputs.title: Your Financial Outputs

kpiDesc.nominal: Raw physically accumulated money in your accounts.
kpiDesc.real: Money adjusted for inflation based today's cost of living.

kpiDesc.interests: Extra capital generated thanks to compound interest.

fire.targetNumberDesc: Minimum invested capital you need to fund your expenses forever under the 4% rule.
fire.descText: Based on your monthly expenses of {{expenses}}€ and a safe withdrawal rate of 4%, you need a real portfolio of {{fireNumber}}€. At your current saving and investment rate, you will reach it in:
